raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "H.R. 669 would prohibit the President from unilaterally authorizing the deployment of nuclear weapons in an offensive attack absent express authorization from Congress.",
    "H.R. 669 does not impede a President’s ability to respond with all necessary force to a nuclear attack on the United States.",
    "AJR 30 demonstrates Californians’ commitment to protecting all of the world’s people from the terror of a nuclear war.",
    "AJR 30 calls for every member of California’s Congressional Delegation to support the balance of powers proposed in H.R. 669.",
    "H.R. 669 would prohibit the President from launching a first nuclear strike without first coming to Congress for a declaration of war.",
    "The passing of AJR 30 is a step towards preventing a United States President from launching an unprovoked nuclear strike without Congressional oversight."
  ]
}
```
